_comment: Unattended full-auto profile. NOT auto-loaded by Claude Code — pass it explicitly for headless `--auto` runs: `claude -p "/build docs/prd.md --auto" --settings .claude/settings.auto.json`. It removes permission prompts (there is no human to approve them) by allowing the core tools, and forces auto-continue so the loop drives itself across turns. Safety is NOT relaxed: this MERGES over `.claude/settings.json`, whose deterministic gate hooks (pre-write-gate, pre-bash-gate) and git hooks still fire, the /auto ratchet + security + pre-PR verify gates still block, and no PR opens over a red build. Do NOT make this the default settings.json — interactive sessions keep the curated allowlist in settings.json.
